description: Add Fastify routes for all Git/PR/Issue/CI/AI DevTools operations in apps/quantmail/backend/routes/ and register them in app.ts
steps: Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/git.ts - Fastify plugin with routes for git operations: POST /git/repos (create repo), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name, DELETE /git/repos/:owner/:name, PATCH /git/repos/:owner/:name (update settings), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/branches (list branches).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/pull-requests.ts - Fastify plugin: POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls (create PR), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls (list), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number, POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number/merge, POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number/close, GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number/diff.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/reviews.ts - Fastify plugin: POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number/reviews (submit review), POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number/comments (add comment), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/pulls/:number/reviews (list reviews).

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/issues.ts - Fastify plugin: POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/issues (create), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/issues (list), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/issues/:number, PATCH /git/repos/:owner/:name/issues/:number (update), POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/issues/:number/labels, POST /git/repos/:owner/:name/issues/:number/assignees.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/ci.ts - Fastify plugin: GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/ci/runs (list runs), GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/ci/runs/:runId, GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/ci/runs/:runId/jobs, GET /git/repos/:owner/:name/ci/runs/:runId/jobs/:jobId/logs.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/routes/ai-devtools.ts - Fastify plugin: POST /devtools/code-review (review diff), POST /devtools/commit-message (generate from diff), POST /devtools/pr-description (generate from commits), POST /devtools/ci-fix (suggest fix from logs), POST /devtools/code-search (semantic search), POST /devtools/security-scan (scan diff).
Update apps/quantmail/backend/app.ts to import and register all new route plugins with appropriate prefixes: git routes at /api/v1, AI devtools at /api/v1.
Update apps/quantmail/vitest.config.ts include pattern if needed to ensure new test files are discovered.
Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run to confirm all existing + new tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: All route files use proper Fastify plugin pattern with Zod request validation
Routes correctly instantiate and delegate to their respective services
app.ts registers all new routes with proper prefixes
getUserId pattern is used consistently for authentication
All test files pass with NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run from repo root passes with all new and existing test files
findings: All route files created and registered in app.ts. Tests pass (99/101 test files - 2 pre-existing failures: shared-ui DOM and ai-ci-fix assertion). Prettier reformatted via lint-staged on commit. Routes use getUserId pattern, Zod validation, and reply.send({ success: true, data }) consistently.
